creator: ed@80386.nl
text:
Hello all,

FreeBSD -CURRENT's syscons(4) now supports scrolling regions. This still
makes this patch invalid, because adding the entry to termcap will
seriously break setups where people SSH from another FreeBSD system to a
system running -CURRENT.

Just thought it would be worth mentioning here, to prevent any
confusion.

-- 
 Ed Schouten <ed@80386.nl>
 WWW: http://80386.nl/
